case_title: HOLDERNESS, WILLIAM ALEXANDER VS GUSTAVESON, JEFF, (MANANGING DIRECTOR VTRADER INC)

docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GUSTAVESON, JEFF, (MANANGING DIRECTOR VTRADER INC)
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GUSTAVESON, JEFF, (MANANGING DIRECTOR VTRADER INC)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOLDERNESS, WILLIAM ALEXANDER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUSTAVESON, JEFF, (MANANGING DIRECTOR VTRADER INC) $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $77.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,077.00, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY FILED; NEW ATTORNEY IS STEVEN A. BOOSKA

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY HOLDERNESS, WILLIAM ALEXANDER AS TO DEFENDANT GUSTAVESON, JEFF, (MANANGING DIRECTOR VTRADER INC) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-03-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-03-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-24-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $879.74 AS TO DEFENDANT GUSTAVESON, JEFF, (MANANGING DIRECTOR VTRADER INC)
